description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet or shelving unit with a modern, urban design, finished in a dark gray wood grain texture. The front features a single upper door, three open shelves in the middle, and a lower drawer, each with a small, round handle. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the verticality and sleekness of the piece. The back appears to be a solid, lighter-colored panel, likely for stability and to keep contents secure. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of engineered wood or laminate, with metal hardware for the handles and hinges. This unit is suitable for use in urban environments such as apartment hallways, garages, or communal spaces for organized storage.
description: A tall, narrow gray wood-grain cabinet with an upper door, three open shelves, and a lower drawer, featuring minimalist handles and a modern urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upper door, three open shelves, and a lower drawer with visible handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood-grain panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, light-colored back panel, likely for structural support.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain wood-grain surface and a slight hint of the front hardware.
